## Why It Is Useful

This external resource is an earlier Claude-oriented K-Dense scientific skill
collection.

## Use In This Repository

No text, prompts, examples, code, or files from the external repository are
copied or adapted here. The newer `K-Dense-AI/scientific-agent-skills` source is
already triaged and partially copied in this repository.
